basic.question_text: 查询 **id 为 6** 的电影的全部信息。
basic.question_context: 使用 WHERE 子句精确匹配 id = 6。
accept_alternatives: SELECT id,title,director,year,length_minutes FROM movies WHERE id=6;
hints: 使用 WHERE 加条件：SELECT * FROM movies WHERE id = 6;
WHERE 子句放在 FROM 后面：SELECT * FROM movies WHERE id = 6;
SELECT * FROM movies WHERE id = 6;

basic.question_text: 查询**2000 年到 2010 年之间（含首尾）**发行的所有电影标题和年份。
basic.question_context: 使用 BETWEEN ... AND ... 表示范围。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT title, year FROM movies WHERE year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010;
accept_alternatives: SELECT title,year FROM movies WHERE year>=2000 AND year<=2010;
hints: BETWEEN x AND y 表示在 x 到 y 之间（含两端）
SELECT title, year FROM movies WHERE year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010;
SELECT title, year FROM movies WHERE year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010;

basic.question_text: 查询**不在** 2000 年到 2010 年之间发行的电影标题和年份。
basic.question_context: 使用 NOT BETWEEN 排除范围。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT title, year FROM movies WHERE year NOT BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010;
hints: NOT BETWEEN 是 BETWEEN 的反义：排除指定范围
SELECT title, year FROM movies WHERE year NOT BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010;
SELECT title, year FROM movies WHERE year NOT BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010;

basic.question_text: 查询**前 5 部**皮克斯电影的标题和发行年份（按 id 顺序）。
basic.question_context: 使用 LIMIT 限制返回行数。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT title, year FROM movies ORDER BY id LIMIT 5;
hints: LIMIT N 放在查询末尾，限制返回 N 行
SELECT title, year FROM movies ORDER BY id LIMIT 5;
SELECT title, year FROM movies ORDER BY id LIMIT 5;

basic.question_text: 查询在以下年份发行的电影：**1995、1999、2003**（title 和 year）。
basic.question_context: 使用 IN (...) 来匹配多个值。
basic.reference_sql: SELECT title, year FROM movies WHERE year IN (1995, 1999, 2003);
hints: IN (值1, 值2, ...) 匹配列表中的任意一个值
SELECT title, year FROM movies WHERE year IN (1995, 1999, 2003);
SELECT title, year FROM movies WHERE year IN (1995, 1999, 2003);

intermediate.question_text: 查询**2005 年以后（不含 2005）**发行的所有电影，返回所有列。
hints: year > 2005 表示年份大于 2005（不包括等于）
SELECT * FROM movies WHERE year > 2005;
SELECT * FROM movies WHERE year > 2005;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**片长小于 100 分钟**的电影标题和片长。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT title, length_minutes FROM movies WHERE length_minutes < 100;
hints: length_minutes < 100 筛选片长小于 100 分钟的
SELECT title, length_minutes FROM movies WHERE length_minutes < 100;
SELECT title, length_minutes FROM movies WHERE length_minutes < 100;

intermediate.question_text: 查询 id 为 1、3、5、7、9、11、13 中**任意一个**的电影标题。
intermediate.question_context: 使用 IN 匹配奇数 ID。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT title FROM movies WHERE id IN (1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13);
hints: SELECT title FROM movies WHERE id IN (1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13);
SELECT title FROM movies WHERE id IN (1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13);

intermediate.question_text: 查询 **Brad Bird** 导演且**片长超过 110 分钟**的电影所有列。
intermediate.question_context: 使用 AND 连接多个条件。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT * FROM movies WHERE director = 'Brad Bird' AND length_minutes > 110;
hints: 用 AND 连接两个条件：director = 'Brad Bird' AND length_minutes > 110
SELECT * FROM movies WHERE director = 'Brad Bird' AND length_minutes > 110;
SELECT * FROM movies WHERE director = 'Brad Bird' AND length_minutes > 110;

intermediate.question_text: 查询**John Lasseter 导演的，或片长小于 100 分钟的**电影标题、导演和片长。
intermediate.question_context: 使用 OR 连接两个条件。
intermediate.reference_sql: SELECT title, director, length_minutes FROM movies WHERE director = 'John Lasseter' OR length_minutes < 100;
hints: 用 OR 连接两个条件：满足任意一个即可
SELECT title, director, length_minutes FROM movies WHERE director = 'John Lasseter' OR length_minutes < 100;
SELECT title, director, length_minutes FROM movies WHERE director = 'John Lasseter' OR length_minutes < 100;

challenge.question_text: 查询不是 John Lasseter 导演的，片长在 100 到 120 分钟之间的电影标题和导演。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT title, director FROM movies WHERE director != 'John Lasseter' AND length_minutes BETWEEN 100 AND 120;
hints: 用 AND 组合两个条件：director != 'John Lasseter' 和 length_minutes BETWEEN 100 AND 120
SELECT title, director FROM movies WHERE director != 'John Lasseter' AND length_minutes BETWEEN 100 AND 120;
SELECT title, director FROM movies WHERE director != 'John Lasseter' AND length_minutes BETWEEN 100 AND 120;

challenge.question_text: 查询年份在 1995-2000 或 2005-2010 范围内的电影标题和年份，按年份升序排列。
challenge.question_context: 使用 OR 连接两个 BETWEEN 条件。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT title, year FROM movies WHERE year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2000 OR year BETWEEN 2005 AND 2010 ORDER BY year;
hints: (year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2000) OR (year BETWEEN 2005 AND 2010)
SELECT title, year FROM movies WHERE year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2000 OR year BETWEEN 2005 AND 2010 ORDER BY year;
SELECT title, year FROM movies WHERE year BETWEEN 1995 AND 2000 OR year BETWEEN 2005 AND 2010 ORDER BY year;

challenge.question_text: 查询评分（rating）大于等于 8.0 的电影的 id 和片长，按片长降序排列。
challenge.question_context: 需要 JOIN boxoffice 表来获取 rating 数据。尝试自学 INNER JOIN。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT movies.id, length_minutes FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE rating >= 8.0 ORDER BY length_minutes DESC;
accept_alternatives: SELECT id, length_minutes FROM movies JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id=boxoffice.movie_id WHERE rating>=8.0 ORDER BY length_minutes DESC;
hints: 需要 JOIN boxoffice 表：INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id
SELECT movies.id, length_minutes FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE rating >= 8.0 ORDER BY length_minutes DESC;
SELECT movies.id, length_minutes FROM movies INNER JOIN boxoffice ON movies.id = boxoffice.movie_id WHERE rating >= 8.0 ORDER BY length_minutes DESC;

challenge.question_text: 写一条 SQL，查询 2005 年之后发行的电影数量。
challenge.question_context: 使用 COUNT(*) 聚合函数。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movies WHERE year > 2005;
accept_alternatives: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM movies WHERE year>2005;
hints: COUNT(*) 返回符合条件的行数
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movies WHERE year > 2005;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movies WHERE year > 2005;

challenge.question_text: 查询所有电影，返回标题，跳过前 10 行，取第 11 到第 14 行。
challenge.question_context: 使用 LIMIT 和 OFFSET 组合。
challenge.reference_sql: SELECT title FROM movies ORDER BY id LIMIT 4 OFFSET 10;
accept_alternatives: SELECT title FROM movies LIMIT 4 OFFSET 10;
hints: LIMIT N OFFSET M 表示跳过 M 行后取 N 行
SELECT title FROM movies ORDER BY id LIMIT 4 OFFSET 10;
SELECT title FROM movies ORDER BY id LIMIT 4 OFFSET 10;
